title: Idempotent public writes
description: Every public Ledger mutation requires a caller-visible stable idempotency identity, including account/category maintenance, transaction/category/relationship changes, backup creation, restore activation, and storage evolution. Reuse with the same operation, contract version, and semantically identical request returns the original result without a second effect; reuse across operations, versions, or materially different requests returns a stable conflict and never overwrites the original. Validation failures do not consume the identity.
